'''âr-s-t''' ('''karasat''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:moan|moan]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| r-s-t
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:moan|moan]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âr-s-t
|-
! Lemma
| karasat
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thirasat|thirasat]] || [[word:jirasat|jirasat]] || [[word:shirasat|shirasat]] || [[word:kirasat|kirasat]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthurasat|thuthurasat]] || [[word:jujurasat|jujurasat]] || [[word:shushurasat|shushurasat]] || [[word:kukurasat|kukurasat]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thurasat|thurasat]] || [[word:jurasat|jurasat]] || [[word:shurasat|shurasat]] || [[word:kurasat|kurasat]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thurasat|thurasat]] || [[word:jurasat|jurasat]] || [[word:shurasat|shurasat]] || [[word:kurasat|kurasat]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:therasat|therasat]] || [[word:jerasat|jerasat]] || [[word:sherasat|sherasat]] || [[word:kerasat|kerasat]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothorasat|thothorasat]] || [[word:jojorasat|jojorasat]] || [[word:shoshorasat|shoshorasat]] || [[word:kokorasat|kokorasat]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thorasat|thorasat]] || [[word:jorasat|jorasat]] || [[word:shorasat|shorasat]] || [[word:korasat|korasat]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thorasat|thorasat]] || [[word:jorasat|jorasat]] || [[word:shorasat|shorasat]] || [[word:korasat|korasat]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠrasat|thĂŠrasat]] || [[word:jĂŠrasat|jĂŠrasat]] || [[word:shĂŠrasat|shĂŠrasat]] || [[word:kĂŠrasat|kĂŠrasat]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thatharasat|thatharasat]] || [[word:jajarasat|jajarasat]] || [[word:shasharasat|shasharasat]] || [[word:kakarasat|kakarasat]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:tharasat|tharasat]] || [[word:jarasat|jarasat]] || [[word:sharasat|sharasat]] || [[word:karasat|karasat]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:tharasat|tharasat]] || [[word:jarasat|jarasat]] || [[word:sharasat|sharasat]] || [[word:karasat|karasat]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:sharasat|sharasat]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:gosharasat|gosharasat]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokisharasat|gokisharasat]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:sharasatnĂŒ|sharasatnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:gosharasatnknĂŒ|gosharasatnknĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokisharasatnĂŒ|gokisharasatnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:sharasatshĂ«|sharasatshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gosharasatnkshĂ«|gosharasatnkshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokisharasatshĂ«|gokisharasatshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:sharasatro|sharasatro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gosharasatnkro|gosharasatnkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokisharasatro|gokisharasatro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:sharasatmu|sharasatmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gosharasatnkmu|gosharasatnkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokisharasatmu|gokisharasatmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:sharasatsher|sharasatsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gosharasatnksher|gosharasatnksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokisharasatsher|gokisharasatsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:sharasatng|sharasatng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gosharasatnkng|gosharasatnkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokisharasatng|gokisharasatng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:sharasatya|sharasatya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gosharasatnkya|gosharasatnkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokisharasatya|gokisharasatya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:sharasatyam|sharasatyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gosharasatnkyam|gosharasatnkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokisharasatyam|gokisharasatyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:sharasatnĂŒshĂ«|sharasatnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gosharasatnknĂŒshĂ«|gosharasatnknĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokisharasatnĂŒshĂ«|gokisharasatnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:sharasatnĂŒro|sharasatnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gosharasatnknĂŒro|gosharasatnknĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokisharasatnĂŒro|gokisharasatnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:sharasatnĂŒmu|sharasatnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gosharasatnknĂŒmu|gosharasatnknĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokisharasatnĂŒmu|gokisharasatnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:sharasatshĂ«nĂŒ|sharasatshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gosharasatnkshĂ«nĂŒ|gosharasatnkshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokisharasatshĂ«nĂŒ|gokisharasatshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:sharasatshĂ«ro|sharasatshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gosharasatnkshĂ«ro|gosharasatnkshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokisharasatshĂ«ro|gokisharasatshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:sharasatshĂ«mu|sharasatshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gosharasatnkshĂ«mu|gosharasatnkshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokisharasatshĂ«mu|gokisharasatshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:sharasatronĂŒ|sharasatronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gosharasatnkronĂŒ|gosharasatnkronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokisharasatronĂŒ|gokisharasatronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:sharasatroshĂ«|sharasatroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gosharasatnkroshĂ«|gosharasatnkroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokisharasatroshĂ«|gokisharasatroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:sharasatromu|sharasatromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gosharasatnkromu|gosharasatnkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokisharasatromu|gokisharasatromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:sharasatmunĂŒ|sharasatmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gosharasatnkmunĂŒ|gosharasatnkmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokisharasatmunĂŒ|gokisharasatmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:sharasatmushĂ«|sharasatmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gosharasatnkmushĂ«|gosharasatnkmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokisharasatmushĂ«|gokisharasatmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:sharasatmuro|sharasatmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gosharasatnkmuro|gosharasatnkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokisharasatmuro|gokisharasatmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

{{wordpage|691fcb1}}
